name: Paper Writer
description_en: A medical/scientific paper-writing workflow that manages the full pipeline from literature search to a submission-ready IMRAD manuscript.
description_zh: 医学/科研论文写作工作流,管理从文献检索到可投稿 IMRAD 稿件的全流程。
long_en: Maintains a project directory with section files, a literature matrix, reference management, and quality checklists; supports English and Japanese.
long_zh: 维护含分节文件、文献矩阵、参考文献管理与质量清单的项目目录;支持英文与日文。
sec_note_en: Drafts manuscript text and manages references; verify all citations and claims before submission.
sec_note_zh: 起草稿件文本并管理参考文献;投稿前请核验所有引用与论断。
